goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'leave after 12:45'.
The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
